the story

one year.
one class.
one final ride.

A cinematic documentary series following the St. Cloud High School Class of 2027 through every milestone, memory, and goodbye of senior year.

From senior sunrise to the final sunset, every chapter captures the moments that seem ordinary now—and become unforgettable later.

the chapters

ten chapters.
one complete year.

New chapters arrive throughout the 2026–2027 school year.

01

august 10, 2026

meet again at sunrise

The series begins at Senior Sunrise. Hopes, fears, predictions, and the feeling that the entire year is still waiting ahead.

coming soon
02

late august 2026

the last first day

New schedules, familiar faces, crowded hallways, and the strange realization that every first this year is also a last.

coming soon
03

october 2026

one last homecoming

Spirit week, Friday-night lights, pep rallies, traditions, and one final celebration of the place that became home.

coming soon
04

january 2027

halfway gone

The first semester ends. We look back at what changed, what stayed, and why graduation suddenly feels much closer.

coming soon
05

february 2027

what comes next?

College, careers, uncertainty, acceptance, rejection, and the pressure of choosing what life might look like after high school.

coming soon
06

march 2027

you had to be there

Lunch-table jokes, hallway chaos, blurry clips, and the little moments that make no sense to anyone except the people who lived them.

coming soon
07

april 2027

prom night

Getting ready, taking pictures, dancing, laughing, and realizing this may be one of the final nights everyone is together.

coming soon
08

may 26, 2027

the last bell

The final school day. The last classes, signed yearbooks, empty lockers, and the walk out of school that cannot be repeated.

coming soon
09

graduation week — tba

graduation

Families, caps and gowns, crossing the stage, throwing the caps, and officially becoming former high-school students.

date tba
10

after graduation — tba

meet again at sunset

The same people. The same questions. New answers. Sunrise predictions meet reality as the final year reaches its last light.

date tba
the hosts

the people carrying the story.

Six voices. One graduating class. A year of memories told from sunrise to sunset.

andrew.

Andrew—or Komplex, if you ask him—is one of the loudest, funniest, and most caring people you will ever meet. Whether he is behind a camera, on a basketball court, or brainstorming his next project, he is always creating something. A state champion—he will make sure you know that—a longtime YouTube creator, and the mind behind before the sun sets, Andrew believes every moment is worth remembering before it becomes a memory.

CHAPTERS0 / 10
FEATURED MOMENTS0
HOURS FILMED0
FAVORITE MEMORYloading...

the camera only records it once.

skylar.

Make way—Madam President is here. Skylar has served as president of the St. Cloud High School Class of 2027 since she first touched down at the Cloud in 2023, and leadership is only one part of what she does. She lifts weights, plays lacrosse, competes in flag football, and continues finding new ways to prove there is very little she cannot do. As the second host of before the sun sets, Skylar will help lead the Class of 2027 through its final year—and all the way to sunset.

CHAPTERS0 / 10
FEATURED MOMENTS0
SPORTS3
FAVORITE MEMORYloading...

leading the way to sunset.

taylor.

Need a babysitter? Taylor has you covered—for sure. She is one of the funniest, smartest, and kindest people in the entire graduating class, but do not tell everyone else we said that. Taylor loves working with children, spending time with her friends, and teaming up with Andrew to pressure Autumn into free açaí bowls. Wherever she goes, she brings warmth, humor, and the kind of energy that helps people feel comfortable. As the third host of before the sun sets, Taylor will be right there holding your hand all the way to sunset—probably crying before anyone else does.

CHAPTERS0 / 10
FEATURED MOMENTS0
FREE AÇAÍ BOWLSpending...
FAVORITE MEMORYloading...

holding your hand into sunset.

desiree.

Need a babysitter? She has you. A nurse? She is working on it. An artist or social media manager? Already covered. Desiree works at a daycare because she genuinely loves working with children, and after completing the nursing program at St. Cloud High School, she is one step closer to becoming a full-fledged nurse. Beyond everything she has accomplished, Desiree has a huge heart and is always willing to help someone whenever they need it. She also manages Andrew's YouTube channel—and she is doing a great job. As one of the hosts of before the sun sets, Desiree will help lead us to sunset, laughing her butt off the entire way.

CHAPTERS0 / 10
FEATURED MOMENTS0
NURSING PROGRAMcompleted
FAVORITE MEMORYloading...

laughter all the way to sunset.

sabrina.

Vice President of the Class of 2027, Sabrina is always finding a way to bring people together. Whether she’s helping organize events, lifting in the weight room, or working through the nursing program, she’s someone people can count on. She’s always willing to lend a hand, always ready with a joke, and somehow manages to make every moment a little more fun. Her positivity, kindness, and infectious sense of humor leave an impression wherever she goes, making her one of the people everyone is glad to have around. As the year comes to a close, Sabrina will be there—trying to make you smile on the way to sunset.

CHAPTERS0 / 10
FEATURED MOMENTS0
CLASS ROLEvice president
ACTIVITIESweightlifting + nursing

making you smile on the way to sunset.

milani.

The captain is here. Milani is the captain of the Golden Girls at St. Cloud, a club leader, and somehow another host who works with kids—which means nearly this entire group could run a babysitting business together. Andrew, however, would probably lose the permission slip before the parents even left the driveway. Milani is incredibly sweet, the kind of one-of-a-kind friend who makes people feel safe, seen, and cared for. She has a soft, loving soul, brings warmth wherever she goes, and never hesitates to show up for the people she loves. As senior year unfolds, Milani will be there to lead, encourage, and hug you allll the way to sunset.

CHAPTERS0 / 10
FEATURED MOMENTS0
ROLEgolden girls captain
KNOWN FORleading with love

hugging you allll the way to sunset.

Day 1

of senior year. The counter begins at Senior Sunrise.

why this exists.

Senior year only happens once. Everyone remembers it differently. This project exists so we never have to rely on memory alone.

0 / 27 discovered

class of 2027

leave your mark.

“see you at sunset.” “we really made it.” “never forget the ordinary days.” “class dismissed.” “you had to be there.” “meet again someday.”

some pages are signed long before the year is over.

memory 27

before the sun sets

you stayed. you looked. you listened. you remembered.

this website was never about hidden messages.

it was about making sure someone, somewhere remembered senior year.

thank you.
class of 2027.

see you again.

a hidden memory.

thank you for staying.

memory 01

nobody knew this would become one of our favorite memories.

a hidden beginning.

every ending begins
with a sunrise.

thank you for joining us before the sun sets.

we hope you'll stay until sunset.

both memories found.

before the sun sets

some people will leave this year with only memories.

others will leave with friendships that last a lifetime.

no matter where life takes you—thank you for spending this year with us.

see you again, someday.

a hidden memory.

some endings are
just another beginning.

you found the sunset.
